mechanics.excerpt: EQUIPMENT Pulse Laser Rifle: Unlike other laser weapons the pulse Iaser rifle has yet to gain widespread acceptance The weapon' high cost and scarcity make it weapon of the wealthy: rating accounts for built-in recoil compensation as well as stat ic mount; no additional recoil compensation can be added; Lasers While far more expensive than their machine gun brethren_ heawy support-class asers can deliver an incredible amount of firepower: Conversely; they require incredible amount power: Even the heaviest of portable power packs provide them only enough charge for few shots Tne support lasers do how- ever; have special port that allows them plug directly into vehicle 0r building power system Support Laser: Like the support machine gun the support Iaser is too heavy and bulky for a infantryman to carry: However; can be mounted on battle- armor troopers battlesuits.
